author: matthttam
description: Render interactive TTRPG maps from code blocks with markers, templates, and distance measurement tools. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features

### Marker lock
- New marker lock toggle in zoom controls (map-pin / map-pin-off icon)
- When locked, marker dragging is prevented; drag gestures convert to pan instead
- Lock state persists in sidecar data
- Lock toggles (zoom, pan, markers) also accessible from the Edit Map modal

### Lock warning toasts
- Small toast notifications appear when attempting locked actions: "Marker positions are locked", "Pan is locked", "Zoom is locked"
- Warnings fade out over 2 seconds with no stacking
- Hovering a warning pauses the fade animation and dismissal timer
- Clicking a warning opens map settings and highlights the relevant lock toggle with a pulse animation

### UI control visibility
- Show or hide individual map controls (zoom, measurement, marker list, layer list, settings button) at both global and per-map level
- Per-map uses Inherit / Show / Hide to override global defaults
- When the settings button is hidden, an "Edit map" context menu item provides access
- Tab bar corners adapt dynamically via CSS `:has()` selectors

### Label fonts
- 12 font families selectable at global, per-map, and per-marker level with runtime availability detection
- Each font stack includes cross-platform fallbacks
- Applied via `--marker-font` CSS custom property on marker title and description elements
- Data-driven `MARKER_FONTS` array as single source of truth; `MarkerFont` is now a string type

### Control opacity
- Slider (0-100%, default 50%) at global and per-map level sets resting opacity of all map UI controls
- Uses `--control-opacity` CSS custom property
- "Edit map" context menu appears when control opacity is 0%

### Collapsible modal sections
- Markers, Text, Controls, and Layers sections in the map settings modal use animated accordion expand/collapse
- Marker edit modal groups Alias, Preview note, Description, and Label font into a collapsible "Additional options" section
- Section state persists across modal opens

### View state persistence
- Zoom level and pan position are saved to the sidecar file on unload
- Restored automatically when re-rendering the map

### Alias without note
- Markers can display an alias on the map and in the marker list even without a linked note

## Performance

- **Viewport-only rendering**: markers outside the visible viewport are never created in the DOM; `syncViewportMarkers` does differential add/remove as the viewport changes, with a 0.3s fade-in animation for new markers
- **CSS translate pan**: marker overlay uses CSS translate for panning instead of repositioning every marker individually
- **Debounced zoom settle**: instant scaled transform on zoom, then re-rasterize at native resolution after 150ms for crisp rendering
- **DocumentFragment batching** for initial marker DOM creation
- **Cached image scale** to avoid forced layout reflow during drag
- **Measurement mode** toggles a CSS class instead of triggering a full re-render
- Hidden-layer markers are fully excluded from the DOM (not just hidden with opacity)

## Bug Fixes

- SVG `overflow:visible` prevents stroke clipping on pins and circles
- Icon rotation uses `style.setProperty` for `--icon-rotation` custom property (fixes Obsidian compatibility)
- Copy mode now blocks navigation and drag on existing markers
- Pan-locked cursor no longer overrides crosshair during measurement
- Label `pointer-events:none` during measurement and on hidden layers
- Bounce animation finishes its current cycle before stopping on mouseleave
- Hotspot markers show translucent grey fill while bouncing
- Tab button corner rounding based on active/inactive state
- Pan start uses current mouse position on back-navigation
- Crosshair cursor displays over labels during measurement
- Dual-handle zoom range slider alignment fix
- Setting name min-width prevents truncation in wide modals

## Refactoring

- Extracted `MeasurementController` from `MapRenderer` (~426 lines), including full UI lifecycle (toolbar, rounding controls, total display)
- Extracted context menu builder into `contextMenu.ts`
- Extracted `buildFontDropdown` into `sharedFields.ts` (shared by global settings, map settings, and marker edit modal)
- Refactored large methods in `MapRenderer`: no function exceeds 88 lines, total reduced from ~2,577 to ~1,975 lines
- Refactored settings tab, template modal, and marker edit modal into focused section methods
- Centralized 2-tier setting resolution via `controlOpacity`, `openLinksInNewTab`, `showHoverPreview` getters

## Tests & Documentation

- 35 new tests (271 total) covering copy mode, view state persistence, marker fonts, alias rendering, and more
- Updated README and features.md with viewport-only rendering, expanded font table, performance section, and all new settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.2.0

### New Features

- **Layer panel** - New Layers tab in the bottom-left map panel alongside the existing Markers tab
  - Tab buttons grouped side-by-side with active highlighting
  - Each layer shows name, zoom range, and grouped action buttons
  - 3-state visibility toggle per layer: Default (normal zoom behavior), Hidden (always invisible), Always visible (always shown)
  - Visibility overrides are session-only and reset on page reload
  - Edit, delete/reset buttons with confirmation prompts
  - Add layer button at the bottom of the list
  - Hovering a layer row fades all other markers to 30% and bounces the hovered layer's markers
  - Pin button controls the whole panel; tabs switch content

### Improvements

- **Hover preview rewrite** - Simplified and more reliable hover system
  - Popover is fully interactable (scroll, click inside)
  - Any mousedown on marker dismisses the popover
  - Alt key dismisses the popover from anywhere
  - Must mouse-out and back in to re-trigger after dismiss
  - Fixed race condition where popover could steal drag focus
  - Fixed stuck-drag bug when popover appeared during drag
- **Shared confirm utility** - All confirmation prompts use a single `confirmAction()` function
- **Layer deletion always prompts** - Confirmation shown even when no markers on the layer
- **Button grouping** - Action buttons in marker and layer lists are visually grouped
- **No-pin-no-icon validation** - Marker must have either a pin shape or an icon; save blocked otherwise
- **Responsive layout** - At 880px breakpoint, edit modal preview stacks below settings
- **Pin selector wraps** - Pin shape buttons wrap to new row on narrow screens
- **Preview labels use normal flow** - No more absolute positioning in edit preview
- **Measurement text on top** - SVG overlay renders above markers during measurement
- **Modal titles** - "Create marker/template/layer" for new items vs "Edit" for existing
- **Drag navigation fix** - Any pixel of mouse movement suppresses click-to-navigate
- **Markers render on image load** - Prevents brief flash at (0,0) position

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.1.0

### New Features

- **Dual-handle zoom range slider** for layer visibility editing - intuitive visual control with editable number inputs
- **Collapsible "Size overrides" section** in marker edit modal - defaults collapsed, persists within session
- **"Add template" opens edit modal** immediately with name field focused and selected
- **Map data management** in global settings - view and delete stored map data with last known image/source paths
- **Map ID change modal** with four actions: Migrate (move data), Copy (duplicate data), Orphan (start fresh, keep old), Delete (start fresh, remove old)
- **Marker fade animation** - markers smoothly fade in/out over 0.5s when crossing layer zoom thresholds
- **Marker z-index on hover** - overlapping markers bump to front when moused over

### Improvements

- **Restructured all modals** to use native Obsidian CSS patterns (setting-group, setting-items, modal titles)
- **Removed `mod-settings` class** from all modals - fixes scrolling on small screens
- **Map settings deferred save** - changes only apply on Save, with Cancel and unsaved changes prompt
- **Reset to template** button in marker edit now shows confirmation prompt and doesn't auto-save
- **Hover preview improvements** - 300ms delay, suppressed by Alt key or mousedown, dismissed on drag
- **Preview note validation** - falls back to linked note if preview note file doesn't exist
- **Preview note fragments** - supports `#header` and `#^block` references using `parseLinktext()`
- **Measurement crosshair** - cursor stays crosshair over markers and labels during measurement
- **Measurement label hit detection** - hovering marker labels also triggers fade during measurement
- **Raw distance always shown** when checkbox is checked (no equality suppression)
- **Rounding/decimal changes** refresh total display immediately
- **Icon search input** wider when empty to fit placeholder text
- **Default open links** changed to current tab instead of new tab
- **Template folders** default to collapsed in settings
- **Resize handles** both render on same side, with dynamic gap for rotated pins
- **Preview label centering** - left/right text placement uses flex layout for natural centering
- **Pin overhang compensation** in edit preview for rotated pins
- **Scale calibration modal** - added Cancel button, clears line on close
- **Center map button** now has tooltip
- **Export** loads fresh markers from disk to prevent stale data
- **Import** saves sidecar before writing code block to prevent race condition

### Code Quality

- Use `Vault.process()` instead of `Vault.modify()` for atomic file writes
- Use `setCssStyles()` for inline styles in markerPin and pinSelector
- Removed 8+ unused CSS classes
- DRY overlay button CSS (shared base for measure/toolbar/settings/list toggle)
- Merged duplicate CSS selectors
- Cleaned up dead CSS (modal overrides, h2/h3 styles, inline reset, help icons)
- Renamed `ttrpgmap-fa-icon` to `ttrpgmap-map-icon`
- Renamed modal width classes to `ttrpgmap-modal--wide` / `ttrpgmap-modal--x-wide`
- Updated default templates (text placement for directional variants)
- Map state registry pattern for last image/source path identification

releases.author: matthttam
releases.description:
### Fixes

- Fix all ESLint issues from Obsidian plugin review bot
- Move test files to tests/ directory (outside bot scan scope)
- Replace inline styles with CSS classes and setCssStyles()
- Remove all unnecessary type assertions
- Add type augmentations for undocumented Obsidian APIs
- Remove all eslint-disable comments from production code
- Fix unused imports and IconEntry type resolution

releases.author: matthttam
releases.description:
### Fixes

- Fix all ESLint issues flagged by the Obsidian plugin review bot
- Replace inline style manipulation with CSS class toggling
- Replace innerHTML usage with safe DOM methods
- Replace browser confirm() with Obsidian Modal dialog
- Convert all UI text to sentence case per Obsidian guidelines
- Fix floating and misused promises
- Add type augmentations for undocumented Obsidian APIs
- Remove all eslint-disable comments from production code
- Add ESLint with eslint-plugin-obsidianmd for local validation

releases.author: matthttam
releases.description:
## TTRPG Maps v1.0.0

First stable release!

### Features
- Interactive pannable, zoomable maps from `ttrpgmap` code blocks
- Customizable markers with 5,500+ icons (Font Awesome + Game Icons)
- Three marker shapes: pin, circle, and hotspot
- Reusable marker templates with folders
- Point-to-point and freehand distance measurement
- Zoom-based visibility layers
- Hover preview for markers with linked notes
- Marker list panel for browsing and managing markers
- Per-map and per-marker settings overrides
- Map import/export as ZIP
- Sidecar storage keeps markdown clean
